summary: Tested Vendor SKU Link features: (1) POST /api/rfq/submit with prefill_fabric_id persists linked_fabric_* fields, (2) PATCH /api/rfq/{id} with prefill_fabric_id also persists linked_fabric_* fields, (3) GET /api/vendor/rfqs returns linked_fabric_* fields, (4) Vendor RFQ list page shows SKU links with correct format, (5) Vendor RFQ detail page shows violet pill SKU link with ExternalLink icon, (6) Fixed missing ExternalLink import in VendorOrders.js. All backend tests PASSED (8/8). All frontend tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing ExternalLink import in VendorOrders.js - was used but not imported from lucide-react
seed_data_creation: Created test RFQs with prefill_fabric_id during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor SKU Link features verified: (1) POST /api/rfq/submit with prefill_fabric_id correctly persists linked_fabric_id, linked_fabric_code, linked_fabric_name, linked_fabric_slug, linked_fabric_category, linked_fabric_seller on rfq_submissions doc, (2) PATCH /api/rfq/{id} with prefill_fabric_id also populates these fields, (3) GET /api/vendor/rfqs returns all linked_fabric_* fields on each RFQ, (4) Vendor RFQ list page (/vendor/rfqs) shows SKU link row with Package icon for RFQs with linked_fabric_id (data-testid=vendor-rfq-sku-link-<rfq_number>), (5) Vendor RFQ detail page (/vendor/rfqs/:rfqId) shows violet pill SKU link below title with ExternalLink icon (data-testid=vendor-rfq-detail-sku-link) when linked_fabric_id is present and not is_shortfall, (6) RFQs without linked_fabric_id do NOT render the SKU row (clean fallback), (7) SKU links correctly point to /fabrics/<slug-or-id> and open in new tab. Vendor Orders page has no orders for denim vendor so SKU link in order modal could not be tested, but code review confirms the implementation is correct.

post_rfq_submit_prefill_fabric_id.details: POST /api/rfq/submit with prefill_fabric_id correctly persists linked_fabric_id, linked_fabric_code, linked_fabric_name, linked_fabric_slug, linked_fabric_category, linked_fabric_seller

patch_rfq_prefill_fabric_id.details: PATCH /api/rfq/{id} with prefill_fabric_id also populates linked_fabric_* fields

vendor_rfqs_list_returns_linked_fabric.details: GET /api/vendor/rfqs returns linked_fabric_* fields on each RFQ

vendor_rfq_list_sku_link_ui.details: Found 3 RFQ cards with SKU links showing 'SKU: LF-HYGDA — Cotton, 3/1 RHT, 12.5oz, Color: Indigo' with correct href /fabrics/cotton-denim-31rht-de-1671-8e6c6e

vendor_rfq_detail_sku_pill.details: Vendor RFQ detail page shows violet pill SKU link with ExternalLink icon (data-testid=vendor-rfq-detail-sku-link)

rfq_without_prefill_no_linked_fabric.details: RFQ created without prefill_fabric_id correctly has no linked_fabric_* fields

rfq_invalid_fabric_id_still_creates.details: RFQ with invalid prefill_fabric_id still creates but without linked_fabric_* fields

sku_link_opens_correct_pdp.details: SKU link /fabrics/cotton-denim-31rht-de-1671-8e6c6e correctly opens fabric PDP showing 'Cotton, 3/1 RHT, 12.5oz, Color: Indigo'

vendor_orders_fabric_code.details: GET /api/vendor/orders returns fabric_code on order items (verified via API test, no orders for denim vendor to test UI)

bug_fixed.issue: ExternalLink icon was used but not imported from lucide-react
bug_fixed.fix: Added ExternalLink to the import statement
